commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a080e26c3f4cc6011b9c28991801da239b93dc17)
commands.review_summary:
The PR resolves `media://inbound/...` image references through the media store before workspace or sandbox path handling in `loadImageFromRef` and adds two regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main detects `media-uri` refs, but `loadImageFromRef` treats `media://inbound/...` as a non-absolute path and resolves it under the workspace before `loadWebMedia` can apply its media-store resolver. I did not run a live Telegram/Gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Contributor action is needed for real behavior proof, and the code path needs maintainer/author review for the sandbox and shared-resolver blocker; this is not a safe ClawSweeper repair marker while external proof is missing.

target.title: fix(images): resolve media://inbound/ URIs in loadImageFromRef
target.author: 0xopaque

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
